title: Hyatt India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Hyatt India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Hyatt India! We are hiring a Guest Relations Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Hyatt India:
Hyatt India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyatt India!
